source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for clean field dashboards with Noto Sans JP guidance for observation labels, table rows, form controls, and compact numeric status readouts.
layout: Stable 8px grids, low-radius field panels, shell-plate grouping, thin olive borders, red stripe active states, compact navigation, dashboard, table, form, chart, and status sections for repeated pond-log survey work.

prompts.label: Transparent painted turtle shell motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: transparent motif cutout for a Morphous design-system catalog.
Primary request: a single painted turtle shell motif, isolated for clean background removal.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, one uniform color, no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane.
Subject: top-down painted turtle shell with a glossy black carapace, olive scute structure, fine yellow-olive seams, and distinct narrow red-orange painted-turtle stripes along the rim and sides. Include subtle natural shell wear and pond-log field character without adding a full turtle body.
Composition: centered object, generous padding, crisp complete silhouette, professional natural-history cutout, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
Palette: black shell, red stripe, olive pond neutrals, muted log-brown edge accents only.
Avoid: text, labels, watermark, brand names, random UI, background objects, green or magenta subject colors that confuse background removal.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog.
Primary request: create a comprehensive clean field UI design-system board inspired by the provided painted turtle shell motif: glossy black shell, red-orange rim stripes, olive scute seams, pond log neutrals.
Canvas: exact 16:9 board, 3840x2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, no watermark, no random brand names.
Overall style: clean field system, precise utilitarian dashboard UI, restrained light background, sharp black-shell typography, red stripe emphasis, olive pond/log neutrals, small shell-scuted texture samples.
Required labeled sections with large readable text: "Painted Turtle", "Light Theme", "Palette", "Typography / English + Japanese", "Navigation", "Dashboard", "Charts", "Table", "Form", "Status", "Components", "Tokens".
UI coverage: top navigation and side navigation, metric dashboard cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, data table with readable column headers, search/command field, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, buttons, badges, alert states, empty/loading/error status examples.
Palette chips: Shell Black, Stripe Red, Pond Olive, Log Brown, Reed Beige, Mist Field, Scute Line.
Layout: organized grid, lots of breathing room, white to mist field surfaces, thin olive borders, red-orange active indicators, black headings, no nested card clutter.
Avoid: illegible tiny text, purple/blue gradients, stock brand names, lorem ipsum walls, fake logos, watermark, unrelated saturated colors.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog.
Input images: use the previous Painted Turtle light design-system board and shell motif as visual references; preserve the same sections and information architecture.
Primary request: create a comprehensive dark-mode version of the Painted Turtle clean field UI system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 board, 3840x2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, no watermark, no random brand names.
Overall style: black-shell dark surfaces, charcoal cards, olive pond panels, red-orange stripe active states, reed beige text highlights, thin scute-line borders, clean data-heavy field dashboard.
Required labeled sections with large readable text: "Painted Turtle", "Dark Theme", "Palette", "Typography / English + Japanese", "Navigation", "Dashboard", "Charts", "Table", "Form", "Status", "Components", "Tokens".
UI coverage: top navigation and side navigation, metric dashboard cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, data table with readable column headers, search/command field, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, buttons, badges, alert states, empty/loading/error status examples.
Palette chips: Shell Black, Stripe Red, Pond Olive, Log Brown, Reed Beige, Mist Field, Scute Line.
Layout: organized grid matching the light board, high contrast, accessible text, subtle shell-scuted texture samples, no nested card clutter.
Avoid: illegible tiny text, purple/blue gradients, stock brand names, lorem ipsum walls, fake logos, watermark, unrelated saturated colors.
